form.formComment: Most recently led to the turn then faded 6th of 12 at Rosehill in the G1 Geo Ryder on March 21 over 1500m, on a slow track; 4 len behind Autumn Glow with 56kg at $26. Before that rolled along in front then was edged out late 2nd of 10 at this track in the G1 Cant Stks on March 7 over 1300m, 0.6 len behind Joliestar with 56kg at $9. Back in trip and will prove hard to run down from the low draw.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Bumped on jumping away by Marhoona and became unbalanced.
Approaching the 200m, shifted in and away from Tentyris.
Began awkwardly.
Raced wide and without cover throughout the event.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Resuming tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 2nd of 7 at Caulfield in the G3 Zeditave on February 21 over 1200m, 1.5 len behind Pallaton carrying 59.5kg at $4.80. Second-up raced on speed throughout when 3rd of 11 at Caulfield in the G1 William Reid on March 21 over 1200m, 0.5 len behind Jigsaw with 56kg at $81. Well placed at the weights and comes out of a solid rating contest.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: At the start inconvenienced and taken in by King Of The Pop.
Knuckled as the start was effected.
Bumped with Aleppo Pine at the start.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break of three months. Finished off last preparation won by 1.5 len Gold Coast Sunlight January 10 over 1100m defeating Nashville Jack with 57kg at $2.25. Previous preparation first-up favourite; won by 3 len Eagle Farm 3yo Hcp November 8 over 1200m defeating Royal Mover carrying 57.5kg at $4.80. Returns with the two trials and others look stronger.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after five months came from midfield; 4th of 14 at Rosehill in the LR Darbymunro on March 21 over 1200m, slow going 1.1 len behind Beskar with 58.5kg at $3.10. Previously second-up 3rd of 12 at Rosehill in the G2 Run To Rose on September 13 over 1200m, on a slow track; 1.5 len behind Tempted carrying 57kg at $5.50. Strips fitter and will appreciate the firmer surface.

form.formComment: Last start got back early 11th of 16 at Rosehill in the G3 St Kingdom on March 28 over 1200m, on a slow track; 7 len behind Roselyn's Star carrying 54kg at $15. The start before that 8th of 14 at Flemington in the G1 Newmarket on March 7 over 1200m, 2.75 len behind Caballus carrying 50kg at $31. Going better than his last two runs suggest, respect with the gear changes.

Slow to begin. Over-raced in the early stages.

form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up in the past. First-up came from midfield and won by a nose at this track LR Fireball March 7 over 1100m defeating Inkaruna with 58.5kg at $2.30. Second-up crossed from a wide gate to settle just off the pace but gave ground when 6th of 14 at Rosehill in the LR Darbymunro on March 21 over 1200m, on a slow track; 1.5 len behind Beskar with 58.5kg at $4.80. Frustrating gelding worth another chance.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Near the 1000m eased from the heels of Nazwah.

form.formComment: Racing well recently. Last start raced right near the speed and boxed on; won by a nose at Rosehill G1 The Galaxy March 21 over 1100m in soft going defeating Jedibeel with 52kg at $12. The start before that held ground to the line 2nd of 9 at this track in the G2 Challenge on March 7 over 1000m, nose behind Generosity carrying 54kg at $9.50. Will stalk the fast tempo and go close again.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up in the past. Freshened for 42 days. First-up favourite; ran on from midfield and won by 1.3 len at this track G3 Esk Prince February 7 over 1200m defeating Napoleonic with 57.5kg at $1.60. Last start favourite; won by a head at this track G1 Surround February 28 over 1400m in soft going defeating Savvy Hallie carrying 56kg at $1.60. Freshened-up well and can finish over the top of these.
